message:
feat(connectors): add limits.rs modules for twitter, notion, and stripe

Extract platform-specific constants from hardcoded magic numbers into
dedicated limits.rs modules following the established discord/telegram pattern.
- Twitter: 6 constants (tweet/DM chars, batch sizes, result limits)
- Notion: 3 constants (blocks per request, title/rich text max chars)
- Stripe: 5 constants (webhook payload, metadata key/value/pairs limits)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,6 +24,7 @@ use tracing::{debug, info, instrument};

     config::TwitterConfig,
+    limits,

     types::{CreateTweetRequest, SearchTweetsParams, StreamRule, TweetReply, User},
